items.title: South African Police Service (SAPS)
items.text: Use for ordinary criminal complaint intake and docket creation. A SAPS-facing brief should identify the complainant, dates, systems or accounts involved, the strongest certified finding, and the key anchor list.
items.source: SAPS public reporting and contact channels

items.title: Directorate for Priority Crime Investigation (Hawks)
items.text: Use when the matter points to serious commercial crime, corruption, or cybercrime features that justify DPCI referral rather than an ordinary police intake alone.

items.title: Legal Practice Council (LPC)
items.text: Use when the matter concerns complaint routing about legal practitioners or when referral to professional-regulation channels is more appropriate than a police or court-first step.
items.source: Legal Practice Council official contact channels

items.title: Companies and Intellectual Property Commission (CIPC)
items.text: Use for company-registration and records context, especially where governance disputes depend on confirming company details, filings, or official records alongside court or counsel strategy.
